---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for project-agi
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement, triage
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the operational, developer, or end-user problem. Avoid solutions in this section.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen. Include API shape, config keys, or UI sketches if applicable.

## Alternatives considered

What else you've thought about and why those don't fit.

## Which band?

- [ ] Band 1 — Product (agi-sdk / agi-core / agi-mcpfyer / agi-packs)
- [ ] Band 2 — Reference Distribution (agi-runtime / agi-ui / agi-auth / agi-chart)
- [ ] Docs / examples / tooling

## Additional context
